name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — mind sharing how it went?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We know the dentist isn't everyone's favourite place to be, so it really means a lot that you trusted us with your smile.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd be so grateful if you'd share a quick review — honest words from patients like you are how other nervous folks find us and decide to finally book that appointment they've been putting off:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something didn't feel right during your visit, please just hit reply — we'd much rather hear from you directly so we can make it right.

Thanks again, and take good care of that smile.

— The Bright Smile team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick follow-up. If you have 30 seconds, a short review would mean the world: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review . Thanks!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
